content.text:
Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /Users/ertugrulsahin/Codalio/demo-projects/parking-app/prd.md:
     1	# Parking App — Product Requirements Document
     2	
     3	## Overview
     4	
     5	A multi-tenant parking management application built on Rhino V4 (Rails API + React frontend). Organizations manage parking lots, spots, vehicles, and reservations.
     6	
     7	## Models
     8	
     9	### ParkingLot
    10	- `name` (string, required) — lot name, e.g. "Downtown Garage A"
    11	- `address` (string, required)
    12	- `total_spots` (integer, required)
    13	- `organization_id` (foreign key)
    14	
    15	### ParkingSpot
    16	- `number` (string, required) — spot identifier, e.g. "A1", "B12"
    17	- `spot_type` (string) — values: "standard", "compact", "handicapped", "ev_charging" (default: "standard")
    18	- `is_available` (boolean, default: true)
    19	- `parking_lot_id` (foreign key)
    20	
    21	### Vehicle
    22	- `license_plate` (string, required, unique per org)
    23	- `make` (string) — e.g. "Toyota"
    24	- `model` (string) — e.g. "Camry"
    25	- `color` (string)
    26	- `vehicle_type` (string) — "car", "motorcycle", "truck" (default: "car")
    27	- `user_id` (foreign key — owner)
    28	- `organization_id` (foreign key)
    29	
    30	### Reservation
    31	- `start_time` (datetime, required)
    32	- `end_time` (datetime, required)
    33	- `status` (string) — "pending", "active", "completed", "cancelled" (default: "pending")
    34	- `total_cost` (decimal)
    35	- `notes` (text)
    36	- `vehicle_id` (foreign key)
    37	- `parking_spot_id` (foreign key)
    38	- `user_id` (foreign key — who made the reservation)
    39	
    40	## Relationships
    41	- Organization has many ParkingLots, Vehicles
    42	- ParkingLot has many ParkingSpots
    43	- ParkingSpot has many Reservations
    44	- Vehicle has many Reservations
    45	- User has many Vehicles, Reservations
    46	
    47	## Roles & Permissions
    48	
    49	### admin
    50	- Full access to all models (CRUD)
    51	
    52	### manager
    53	- ParkingLot: index, show, update
    54	- ParkingSpot: index, show, store, update
    55	- Vehicle: index, show
    56	- Reservation: index, show, store, update
    57	
    58	### member
    59	- Vehicle: index, show, store, update (own vehicles only)
    60	- Reservation: index, show, store (own reservations only)
    61	- ParkingLot: index, show
    62	- ParkingSpot: index, show
    63	
    64	## API Behavior
    65	- All endpoints under tenant route group: `/api/:organization/...`
    66	- ParkingSpot availability updates when a Reservation goes active/completed/cancelled
    67	- Reservations filterable by status, start_time, vehicle_id, parking_spot_id
    68	
    69	## Acceptance Criteria
    70	- [ ] ParkingLot CRUD works for admin and manager
    71	- [ ] ParkingSpot CRUD works; `is_available` reflects active reservations
    72	- [ ] Vehicle CRUD works; members can only manage their own vehicles
    73	- [ ] Reservation lifecycle: pending → active → completed or cancelled
    74	- [ ] All endpoints return correct 403 for unauthorized roles
    75	- [ ] RSpec request specs cover happy path + 403 + 404 per model
    76	- [ ] React frontend: list and detail views for ParkingLots, ParkingSpots, Vehicles, Reservations
    77	- [ ] Frontend connects to Rails API via Vite proxy at `/api`
    78	- [ ] Login flow works; organization slug routing works
    79
